title: Websites & Content Platforms
description: Modern websites and content platforms designed for performance, flexibility, search visibility, and long-term growth.
heroSubtitle: Fast, flexible, and built to grow with your business.

sections.heading: Modern Websites That Make an Impact
content: Your website is often the first impression people have of your business. It should clearly communicate who you are, what you do, and why customers should choose you.
BarkinMad Studios designs and develops websites and content platforms that combine performance, usability, maintainability, accessibility, and search visibility to create a strong online presence.

sections.heading: Performance, Accessibility & SEO
content: Fast-loading websites provide a better experience for visitors while supporting stronger search engine visibility.
Every project is designed with responsive layouts, accessibility, performance, maintainability, and modern SEO best practices from the start.

sections.heading: Flexible Content Management
content: Content-driven platforms make it easy to update pages, publish new content, and expand your website without rebuilding it.
This allows your website to grow naturally as your business, products, and services evolve.

sections.heading: Why Work With BarkinMad Studios?
content: More than 20 years of technology experience.
Independent UK software and web developer.
Real-world websites, apps, and digital products actively designed, developed, and maintained.
Flexible engagement for startups, small businesses, and growing organisations.

cta.title: Create a Website That Works for Your Business
cta.content: Whether you're launching a new website, modernising an existing platform, or building a content-driven solution, BarkinMad Studios can help create a website that's fast, reliable, and designed for long-term success.
